motivation: IDM preprint line 1063-1065: each isomer 'might associate with a set of elementary particles for which there is one elementary-particle counterpart for each known (or ordinary-matter) elementary particle.' This is structurally identical to Mirror Dark Matter. Mirror DM literature provides ΔN_eff formulas applicable as cross-check.

interpretations.label: Dark photon + 3 dark neutrinos per isomer (no dark electrons)
Full mirror SM per isomer (photons + e+e- + 3ν, T_dark > m_e at BBN)

conclusions: Equal-temperature dark sector (x=1) ruled out under ALL interpretations.
5 isomers at x=1: ΔN_eff ∈ [22.0, 75.6] depending on interpretation.
IDM preprint does NOT specify T_dark/T_SM → AUTHOR_DERIVATION_NEEDED.
M7-C verdict remains BLOCKED: cannot compute IDM ΔN_eff without T_dark/T_SM.
SECONDARY: Cool mirror sector (x < 0.35) undermines 5:1 ratio from equal baryon asymmetry → M7-A/B AUTHOR_DERIVATION_NEEDED confirmed.
